title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people helping at an animal centre. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A young woman and a boy are helping at an animal centre. The boy is filling a dog's water bowl while the woman is holding the dog's lead. There are cages, blankets and pet food in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people taking an exercise class. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A group of adults are taking an exercise class in a sports hall. They are standing on mats and following an instructor at the front. There are water bottles, gym balls and large windows in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
